cookies.text_browser: Close the browser and try again, choose a cookies file, or continue without cookies for this operation.

access.title: Source access requires a decision
access.text: This source needs an additional access strategy. Choose the next step for this operation.
access.text_enhanced_recommended: This source may work more completely in enhanced access mode. You can retry with enhanced access or continue in basic mode.
access.text_enhanced_required: This source requires enhanced access. If the environment supports it, retry in enhanced mode.
access.text_provider_missing: Full access to this source requires additional runtime support. You can continue in basic mode only when the source still offers limited access.
access.text_unavailable: Full access to this source is currently unavailable. You can continue only in a limited mode when such a path exists.

welcome.title: Welcome
welcome.text: {name} is an application for audio and video transcription and for working with user-provided sources. It helps prepare transcripts and organize materials in one workspace.
welcome.disclaimer: Only use sources that you are allowed to use under rights you hold or another valid basis. The user is responsible for keeping their use of the application compliant with the law, licenses, and external service rules.

source_rights_notice.title: Adding a network source
source_rights_notice.header: Check source rights before adding it
source_rights_notice.text: Only add network sources that you are allowed to use under rights you hold or another valid basis. Respect licenses, service terms, and access restrictions.
source_rights_notice.disclaimer: Do not bypass technical protections. If the material contains personal data, make sure you have a valid basis for processing it.

help.keep_audio: Saves an audio file next to the transcript (copied or extracted from the source).
help.keep_video: Saves the downloaded video file next to the transcript (only when "Download audio only" is off).

help.low_latency: Shortest analysis window and fastest refresh. Lowest latency, but less context and lower text stability.
help.balanced: Middle ground between latency, amount of context, and output stability.
help.high_context: Larger analysis window and more context between updates. More stable text at the cost of higher latency.

level.debug_tip: Most detailed technical logs. Useful for troubleshooting, but produces the largest log files.
level.error_tip: Records only errors that prevent an operation from completing correctly.
level.info_tip: Standard information about the application run and normal events.
level.warning_tip: Records warnings and potentially problematic situations that are usually recoverable.

bulk_add_confirmation.threshold: Warn when adding at least this many items
bulk_add_confirmation.label: Bulk-add warnings

engine.low_cpu_mem_usage: Reduce RAM usage while loading models

precision.auto_tip: The app chooses a precision based on the device: usually BFloat16 on compatible CUDA GPUs, otherwise Float16 on CUDA or Float32 on CPU.
precision.bfloat16_tip: 16-bit format with a wider numeric range than Float16. On supported GPUs it often offers a good balance of speed, memory usage, and stability.
precision.float16_tip: 16-bit precision with lower memory use. Usually speeds up GPU inference, but has a narrower numeric range than BFloat16 and Float32.
precision.float32_tip: Full 32-bit precision. Most compatible and numerically safest, but usually slower and more memory-intensive.
precision.label: Compute precision

help.concurrent_fragments: Number of fragments downloaded at the same time. Higher values can speed up downloading, but put more load on the connection and server.
help.device: Selects where models run their computations. Auto uses a CUDA GPU when available, otherwise CPU. Forcing GPU may be ignored if the environment does not support CUDA.
help.http_timeout_s: Maximum time to wait for a server response for a single request.
help.ignore_warning: Allows the result to be kept despite model warnings, for example silence, very weak signal, or uncertain language detection. It does not change recognition itself, but decides whether a warned result is accepted.
help.logging_enabled: Writes application events to log files. Useful for diagnosing errors and analyzing program behavior.
help.logging_level: Controls how much information is written to logs.
help.low_cpu_mem_usage: Reduces RAM usage while loading models. It may increase load time and the number of intermediate operations during initialization. It does not change transcription or translation quality.
help.max_bandwidth_kbps: Limits the maximum download speed. A value of 0 disables the limit.
help.max_video_height: Limits selection to video variants that do not exceed the selected height.
help.min_video_height: Skips video variants below the selected height.
help.browser_cookies_mode: Controls whether supported download sources use no cookies, browser cookies, or — in advanced mode — an exported cookies file. For services that require authentication, an exported cookies file is often more stable than reading a live browser profile.
help.browser_cookies_browser: Selects which browser should be used as the cookie source. Auto uses the first Windows browser with a concrete cookie store detected by the runtime.
help.precision_hint: Precision controls the numeric format used by the model. Lower precision usually improves speed and reduces memory use, but can increase the chance of numerical differences. On CPU, Float32 is the safest choice; on compatible GPUs, Auto often selects BFloat16 or Float16.
help.retries: Defines how many times failed network requests are retried before the operation is considered failed.
help.transcription_engine: Selects the model used to convert speech to text. Different models may vary in speed, hardware requirements, and robustness on difficult recordings.
help.translation_chunk_max_chars: Defines the maximum size of text passed to the translation model in one step. Smaller fragments are safer for memory and stability, but they weaken coherence between sentences.
help.translation_engine: Selects the model used to translate text. Different models may vary in speed, fluency, and performance on less common language pairs.
help.translation_max_new_tokens: Sets the upper token limit that the model may generate for a single fragment. A value that is too low can truncate the translation, while a higher one increases generation time.
help.default_language: Sets the default source language policy for file and live transcription. Choose a fixed language, Auto-detect, or Last used in tab.

bulk_add_confirmation.enabled: Show a confirmation dialog before adding many items at once.
bulk_add_confirmation.threshold: The minimum number of detected items that will trigger the bulk-add confirmation.

help.translation_default_language: Sets the default target language policy for translation. Choose app language, a fixed language, or Last used in tab.
help.fp32_math_mode: Only applies to CUDA with Float32 precision. Speeds up some FP32 operations on supported GPUs, but results may differ slightly from strict FP32.
help.context_policy: Controls whether previously recognized text is fed back as context for the next audio fragments. Stronger context reuse can improve sentence continuity, but when recognition goes wrong it can also reinforce mistakes and hallucinations.
help.silence_guard: Controls the thresholds used to reject silence, very weak signal, and fragments that look like model hallucinations. Stronger protection reduces false transcripts, but it can also reject quiet speech.
help.language_stability: Defines how many consistent language detections are required before the language is treated as stable for the current run. Higher values reduce the risk of a wrong language lock, but they also delay the decision.
help.transcription_chunk_length_s: Defines the length of audio passed to Whisper in a single step. A larger window gives the model more context and can improve recognition of longer speech, but it also increases latency, compute cost, and memory use.
help.transcription_stride_length_s: Adds a shared region between neighboring analysis windows. Larger overlap can improve continuity at segment boundaries, but it reprocesses part of the audio and increases the runtime cost.
help.translation_style: Controls how the translation decoder behaves. It influences whether the model prefers a more literal, balanced, or freer phrasing.
help.translation_num_beams: Defines how many alternatives are explored in parallel during beam search. Higher values usually improve translation quality, but they increase generation time and memory use.
help.translation_no_repeat_ngram_size: Blocks repeated n-grams of the given size inside a single translation result. Helps reduce loops and repeated phrases. Set to 0 to disable the restriction.
help.transcription_profile: Defines the ready-made operating profile for transcription: analysis window length, context reuse, silence filtering, and language detection stabilization. Built-in profiles have fixed parameters. The custom profile unlocks manual editing.
help.translation_profile: Defines the translation decoding profile: number of alternatives explored, repetition protection, and decoder behavior. Built-in profiles have fixed parameters. The custom profile unlocks manual editing.
help.browser_cookies_file_path: Path to an exported cookies file used in advanced mode for authenticated yt_dlp downloads. This is the more stable option for YouTube when browser-cookie access is blocked or rotated.

style.label: Translation decoding strategy
style.literal_tip: Prefers a translation that stays closer to the source wording and structure, even at the cost of sounding less natural.
style.balanced_tip: Tries to balance meaning fidelity with natural sounding output.
style.fluent_tip: Prefers smoother, more natural phrasing, even if the result becomes less literal.

profile.label: Translation profile
profile.fast_tip: Lowest decoding cost. Fastest profile, but explores the fewest alternatives and may simplify the result more often.
profile.balanced_tip: Default compromise between generation speed and decoding quality.
profile.accurate_tip: Explores more alternatives and decodes more cautiously. Slower, but usually better for harder or less obvious text.
profile.custom_tip: Unlocks manual editing of translation profile parameters. Starts from the values of the currently selected built-in profile.

context_policy.off_tip: Does not pass previous text as context to the next fragments. Safest when hallucination risk matters most, but may reduce sentence continuity.
context_policy.auto_tip: Passes context only when the audio signal looks reliable enough. Usually the best overall compromise.
context_policy.aggressive_tip: Relies more strongly on previously recognized text. Can improve continuity, but also increases the chance of reinforcing mistakes.

silence_guard.off_tip: Minimal silence and weak-signal filtering. The least intrusive option, but also the most prone to noisy or hallucinated output.
silence_guard.normal_tip: Medium level filtering for silence, weak signal, and artifacts. Default compromise between safety and sensitivity.
silence_guard.strict_tip: Strictest filtering thresholds. Most effective against silence hallucinations, but may reject quiet speech and short inputs.

language_stability.fast_tip: Accepts the detected language after very little confirmation. Most responsive, but also the most error-prone.
language_stability.balanced_tip: Requires a moderate number of consistent confirmations before language is treated as stable.
language_stability.strict_tip: Requires more matching detections before language is treated as stable. Most robust, but also the slowest to settle.

profile.accurate_tip: Uses longer analysis windows and more conservative recognition behavior. Slower, but usually more stable on longer utterances and harder material.
profile.balanced_tip: Default compromise between speed, context stability, and resistance to typical recording problems.
profile.fast_tip: Uses shorter analysis windows and less conservative thresholds. The fastest profile, but it is weaker on noise, quiet speech, and more difficult audio.
profile.guarded_tip: Filters silence, weak signal, and suspicious fragments most aggressively. Best for recordings with pauses, noise, background music, or a high hallucination risk.
profile.custom_tip: Unlocks manual editing of transcription profile parameters. Starts from the values of the currently selected built-in profile.

notice.audio_tracks_probe_only: Some detected audio tracks are probe-only
notice.extended_access_required: This source requires extended extractor access or exposes only limited formats
notice.extended_access_limited: This source works in basic mode, but some formats may be limited
notice.extended_access_unavailable: This source requires extended extractor access that is not available in this runtime
